name: zen-tab-steward
description: Safe CLI stewardship for Zen Browser tabs and workspaces.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli.js status && node dist/cli.js workspaces && node dist/cli.js review Space --json > /dev/null && node dist/cli.js apply list --json > /dev/null && (node dist/cli.js sort Space --preview || test $? -eq 2)

author: 1Pio
